notes: After forcing Proton on this VR works in Linux!
title: PAYDAY 2

notes: I can confirm that VR mode works very fine using proton
title: PAYDAY 2

notes: On the native version i still need to run this command in the launch options of the game "env LD_PRELOAD="$LD_PRELOAD ./libblt_loader.so" %command%"
title: PAYDAY 2

notes: Game doesn't work native (crash), but it does on Proton out of the box. I installed manually D9VK and it worked as well fine with this DX9 to Vulkan translation.
title: PAYDAY 2

notes:
The so called "native" version has horrible performance!
Force-running the windows build in Proton-4.2 gives much better results, just make sure to disable "depth of field" in the in-game options, otherwise you will have some graphic glitches when moving close to walls.
title: PAYDAY 2

notes:
The so called "native" linux build has horrible performance!
Force-running the windows build in Proton gives better results. Just make sure to disable "depth of field" in the in-game option, otherwise you will get some weird coloring glitches when moving close to walls.

SuperBLT can be used, by running "protontricks 218620 winecfg", and then adding a new dll override for iphlpapi (native, builtin).
title: PAYDAY 2

notes: A little fix to the post below mine: you have to add "WSOCK32" as a new dll override if you want to use SuperBLT, otherwise it won't work.
title: PAYDAY 2

notes: Runs very poorly compared to Windows version. On Windows I got easily 70+ fps but on Linux native I experienced fps drops below 30. Launch option "env __GL_THREADED_OPTIMIZATIONS=0 %command%" helps a bit.
title: PAYDAY 2

notes: I read that in OpenGL doesn't work as it should, so I tried with Proton and it works so great. Just the DoF (or some blur effect) doesn't work decent, make some glitch graphics, I had to desactivate it.  Except that, the game works perfectly without less fps than the Windows ver. (if we don't count that the Nvidia's drivers works worst than on Windows).
title: PAYDAY 2

notes: I had bad performance on the Linux build so I tried out the windows build. The performance doesn't seem much better, but also not any worse.
title: PAYDAY 2

notes:
Better FPS than native with PROTON_USE_D9VK=1

My full launch options with SuperBLT: env WINEDLLOVERRIDES="wsock32=n,b" env PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%
title: PAYDAY 2

notes:
Better FPS the native version but still has crashes due to it being 32 bit game and d9vk running out of memory

You can fix this by installing Super BLT and https://paydaymods.com/mods/662/CTC

WINEDLLOVERRIDES="wsock32=n,b" PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 gamemoderun %command%
title: PAYDAY 2
